title: EQ - Changed custom EQ, not saved, exit/return to EQ, changes are present
scenario: Unsaved Custom EQ changes persist after exiting and returning to the EQ settings screen
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Make changes to the custom EQ (e.g., adjust sliders) but do not tap Save
Exit the Equalizer screen (e.g., tap Back or navigate away)
expected: The unsaved custom EQ changes should be discarded and the EQ should return to its previous saved state.
